blocks.text: Real Madrid stunned by Getafe — and Barcelona's Copa mountain looms

Real Madrid fell 0-1 to Getafe on Monday, handing rivals breathing room in La Liga. Tomorrow night Barcelona host Atlético at Camp Nou — but trail 4-0 on aggregate in the Copa del Rey. A miracle or an exit.
